title: Proight
description: Proight is a dark, soul-infused mod that challenges players with powerful gear hidden deep within mysterious biomes
body:
# Proight – Combat Gear for Horror Mods

Tired of feeling too weak against horror mod monsters? **Proight** adds powerful items and gear 🗡️ to help you survive and fight back. Upgrade your arsenal and face even the toughest creatures 🌌.

## 🔮 Key Features

- **Powerful Items ⚔️:** Equip swords, tools, and armor designed to handle dangerous monsters.  
- **New Gear ✨:** Unlock rare equipment to improve your combat capabilities.  
- **New Worlds & Mobs 🌍:** Explore 2 brand-new worlds with unique biomes and encounter new monsters (latest version).  
- **Enhanced Gameplay 👀:** Makes existing horror mods more manageable without removing the challenge.  

**💡 Note:** Version 1.0.5 includes **+10 languages**. Stand your ground, survive the monsters, and come out victorious!
